# vtm_protection (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `access_restriction_allowed` (Set of String)

- `log_time` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
